headline: Of course Meta thinks gambling is the future
summary: Meta's core strategy involves cloning or acquiring successful platforms. The company now appears to be targeting gambling or prediction markets as its next big venture. This move aligns with Meta's history of leveraging other companies' ideas for growth.

headline: Anthropic’s Mythos mess is only getting worse
summary: Anthropic took its Mythos-class AI models offline two weeks ago following a Trump administration ultimatum. The company dispatched executives to Washington DC for urgent negotiations. A resolution remains elusive, with Anthropic declining multiple requests for comment.

headline: Apple’s AirPods Max 2 headphones are still $150 off — for now
summary: Apple's AirPods Max 2 headphones are currently discounted by $150, selling for $399. This Prime Day deal remains active at Walmart, despite Amazon having sold out. Limited stock is available, making this a time-sensitive offer.

headline: Prime Day is offering rare discounts on Philips Hue smart lights
summary: Philips Hue smart lighting products are experiencing unusual and significant discounts this Prime Day. Deals span their entire lineup, from smart bulb starter kits to sleep lamps and smart buttons. Such major price drops are uncommon for Philips Hue, highlighting the rarity of these sales.

headline: IGN Poll Reveals 70% Plan to Buy the GTA 6 Ultimate Edition Over the Standard Edition, Which Begs the Question: Is GTA 6 Effectively the First $100 Video Game?
summary: An IGN poll shows 70% of players intend to purchase the $100 GTA 6 Ultimate Edition. This strong preference over the $80 Standard Edition sparks debate about GTA 6 being the first effectively $100 game. The poll results highlight a significant consumer willingness to pay more for premium game content.

headline: 'I Torture Myself Over Every Last Detail' — Stardew Valley Creator ConcernedApe Says He's 'Still Here, Still Grinding' on Haunted Chocolatier
summary: Stardew Valley creator ConcernedApe reassures fans he's actively working on his next game, Haunted Chocolatier. He attributes the game's long development to his intense focus on every detail. Fans are updated on the progress of the highly anticipated title.

headline: 'A Historic Moment in the History of Manga' — Struggling Japanese Artist's Debut Manga Gets Official English Release After 'Can Barely Afford Cheap Coffee' Post Goes Viral
summary: Japanese artist Shiten Akiyama's debut manga, "Horizon," will receive an official English release. This comes after his post about struggling financially went viral, garnering a cult following. The official English version is scheduled for release in January 2027.

headline: 'Regrettably, This Is Going to Be Our Version of the Dark Age of Technology' — Games Workshop Is Going After Tabletop Simulator Steam Mods That Recreate Warhammer 40,000 11th Edition
summary: Games Workshop is reportedly issuing takedown notices for popular Warhammer 40,000 mods on Tabletop Simulator. These mods allow players to recreate the physical game experience online. The move targets community-created content based on the 11th Edition of the game.

headline: New bodycam footage shows Henry Nowak killer's arrest and repeated lies to police
summary: Bodycam footage reveals the arrest of Henry Nowak's killer, released following a BBC request. The video shows the suspect repeatedly lying to police officers during questioning. This new evidence provides insight into the immediate aftermath of the crime.

headline: Court rules 13 men who allegedly helped rapist drug and abuse wife can be named
summary: A court has ruled that 13 men accused of assisting a rapist in abusing his wife can now be publicly named. The men allegedly participated in the abuse over several years. This decision allows for the identification of those implicated in the long-term abuse.

headline: Watch: Moment woman pulled from rubble alive
summary: Video captures the dramatic rescue of a woman pulled alive from under collapsed building rubble. First responders and volunteers collaborated to free the survivor in La Guaira. The footage highlights the immediate and heroic efforts during a disaster.

headline: King becomes first monarch to reveal tax bill as royal public funding to double to £100m
summary: The King has become the first monarch to publicly disclose his tax bill, totaling £12.9 million. This revelation coincides with royal public funding set to double to £100 million. A detailed breakdown of the tax calculation was not provided.
